name: engineering-workflow
description: Codex-ready rebuild of agent-skills with bundled companion files and cross-platform plugin hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Engineering workflow skills rebuilt for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that packages rebuilt engineering workflow skills, their companion files, and a session-start hook that loads the skill discovery workflow.
defaultPrompt: Start with the right engineering skill for this task
Use spec, plan, build, verify, and review skills in sequence
Load the matching skill before implementing changes
